evidence: PAGE_TITLE: Spain vs Saudi Arabia - World Cup - Group H (Match 38) Atlanta Tickets | June 21, 2026 | StubHub

Page displays event details, seat map, and ticket listings.
No forms for sensitive input (login, payment, transfer code) are visible.

benign_context: Trusted marketplace domain with matching brand

transitions.stopped_reason: No safe clickable element found that directly advances the user one step deeper into the ticket purchase flow. The visible price cards on the seat map are not provided as clickable elements. Other clickable elements are for navigation, filtering, or non-purchase actions.

evidence: Trusted marketplace domain with matching brand

recommended_action: Continue only through the official platform checkout. Do not leave the platform for private payment.
